title: Swimmers back after tackling 'Kilimanjaro'
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Six determined Mossel Bay...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Six determined Mossel Bay open-water swimmers recently took on the legendary 14km Kromme River Challenge in St Francis.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Six determined Mossel Bay open-water swimmers recently took on the legendary 14km Kromme River Challenge in St Francis."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"All six finished within the given time frame."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"These locals trained in icy winter waters as low as 11°C.","html":"These locals trained in icy winter waters as low as 11°C."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Enthusiastic local swimming coach Bronwyn MacDonald skillfully managed the group's weekly training programme.","html":"Enthusiastic local swimming coach Bronwyn MacDonald skillfully managed the group's weekly training programme."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Lelané van der Merwe won the women’s section.","html":"Lelané van der Merwe won the women’s section."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
